comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Audit item G2 needs a shared onPiEvent helper, but the installed @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent ExtensionAPI types and runtime expose pi.on(event, handler): void with no unregister/off hook. We should either add an inert-handler release layer keyed by registration owner, or extend the SDK to expose unsubscribe before claiming full scoped acquireRelease semantics.
